apps.name: Portainer CE
apps.description: Web UI for managing Docker: containers, images, volumes, networks.
apps.why: If you ever want to look 'under the hood' of your server, Portainer shows every container in a friendly web interface — start, stop and inspect things without typing commands. Helmsman already covers the basics, so this is for power users.
apps.compose:
services:
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:9000"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - portainer_data:/data
volumes:
  portainer_data:

apps.name: Uptime Kuma
apps.tagline: Know immediately when something is down
apps.description: Beautiful self-hosted uptime monitoring with notifications.
apps.why: Kuma pings your websites and services around the clock and sends you a message (Telegram, mail, …) the moment something stops responding — so you find out before your friends or family do.
apps.compose:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:1
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3001"
    volumes:
      - kuma_data:/app/data
volumes:
  kuma_data:

apps.name: Grafana
apps.description: Dashboards and visualization for metrics and logs.
apps.why: Grafana turns numbers (CPU, temperatures, visitors, power usage …) into beautiful live dashboards. It needs a data source like Prometheus to be really useful — an advanced but very popular tool.
apps.compose:
services:
  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
volumes:
  grafana_data:

apps.name: Vaultwarden
apps.why: Store all your passwords on YOUR server instead of someone else's cloud. Works with the official Bitwarden apps on phone and browser — install those, point them at your server, done.
apps.compose:
services:
  vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - vw_data:/data
volumes:
  vw_data:

apps.name: AdGuard Home
apps.tagline: Block ads on every device at home
apps.description: Network-wide ad & tracker blocking DNS server.
apps.why: Set your router's DNS to this server and ads + trackers disappear on every phone, TV and laptop in your home — no app needed on the devices themselves.
apps.compose:
services:
  adguard:
    image: adguard/adguardhome:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "53:53/udp"
      - "53:53/tcp"
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    volumes:
      - adguard_work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - adguard_conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
volumes:
  adguard_work:
  adguard_conf:

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: Free media server for movies, shows and music.
apps.why: Put your movies and series on the server and stream them to any TV, phone or laptop with the free Jellyfin apps — like Netflix, but it's your library and no subscription.
apps.compose:
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8096"
    volumes:
      - jf_config:/config
      - jf_cache:/cache
      - {{MEDIA}}:/media:ro
volumes:
  jf_config:
  jf_cache:

apps.name: Navidrome
apps.description: Modern music server, compatible with Subsonic apps (Amperfy, Substreamer …).
apps.why: Stream your own MP3/FLAC collection to your phone like Spotify — with playlists, covers and offline apps. Your music, no monthly fee.
apps.compose:
services:
  navidrome:
    image: deluan/navidrome:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:4533"
    volumes:
      - nd_data:/data
      - {{MUSIC}}:/music:ro
volumes:
  nd_data:

apps.name: Nextcloud
apps.description: Self-hosted files, calendar, contacts and more.
apps.why: Photos, files, calendar and contacts synced across all your devices — like Google Drive/iCloud, but the data stays on your server. The official apps handle automatic photo backup from your phone.
apps.compose:
services:
  db:
    image: mariadb:11
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc-root
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc
    volumes:
      - nc_db:/var/lib/mysql
  app:
    image: nextcloud:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    environment:
      MYSQL_HOST: db
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc
    volumes:
      - nc_data:/var/www/html
    depends_on:
      - db
volumes:
  nc_db:
  nc_data:

apps.name: Gitea
apps.why: Host your code repositories privately on your own server, with a familiar GitHub-style web interface. Mostly interesting if you write code.
apps.compose:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
      - "{{SSH_PORT}}:22"
    volumes:
      - gitea_data:/data
volumes:
  gitea_data:

apps.name: code-server
apps.description: VS Code in the browser, running on your server.
apps.why: A full programming editor that runs on the server and opens in any browser — edit projects from your iPad or a borrowed laptop. For developers.
apps.compose:
services:
  code-server:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/code-server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - PASSWORD={{PASSWORD}}
      - TZ=Europe/Berlin
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8443"
    volumes:
      - cs_config:/config
volumes:
  cs_config:

apps.name: n8n
apps.why: Build little automations by drawing flowcharts: 'when I get a mail with an invoice, save it to Nextcloud and notify me'. No coding needed for most things.
apps.compose:
services:
  n8n:
    image: docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5678"
    volumes:
      - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
volumes:
  n8n_data:

apps.name: Dozzle
apps.description: Realtime log viewer for all your Docker containers.
apps.why: When something misbehaves, Dozzle shows you the live 'diary' of every app on your server in a clean web view. Helmsman shows logs too — Dozzle is the deluxe version.
apps.compose:
services:
  dozzle:
    image: amir20/dozzle:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro

apps.name: Home Assistant
apps.description: Open-source smart home hub: lights, sensors, automations, dashboards.
apps.why: Connects lamps, plugs, thermostats and sensors from almost every brand into one app — with automations like 'lights off when nobody is home'. All local, no cloud accounts.
apps.compose:
services:
  homeassistant:
    image: ghcr.io/home-assistant/home-assistant:stable
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8123"
    volumes:
      - ha_config:/config
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
volumes:
  ha_config:

apps.name: Paperless-ngx
apps.description: Scan, index and archive documents with OCR and full-text search.
apps.why: Photograph or scan your letters, invoices and contracts — Paperless reads the text, sorts them automatically and makes everything searchable. Your paper chaos becomes a searchable archive.
apps.compose:
services:
  broker:
    image: redis:7
    restart: unless-stopped
  paperless:
    image: ghcr.io/paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - broker
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8000"
    environment:
      PAPERLESS_REDIS: redis://broker:6379
    volumes:
      - pl_data:/usr/src/paperless/data
      - pl_media:/usr/src/paperless/media
      - pl_export:/usr/src/paperless/export
      - pl_consume:/usr/src/paperless/consume
volumes:
  pl_data:
  pl_media:
  pl_export:
  pl_consume:

apps.name: Syncthing
apps.description: Continuous peer-to-peer file synchronization between devices.
apps.why: Pick folders on your laptop, phone and server — Syncthing keeps them identical automatically, directly between your devices. Great for backups without any cloud.
apps.compose:
services:
  syncthing:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/syncthing:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8384"
      - "22000:22000/tcp"
      - "22000:22000/udp"
    volumes:
      - st_config:/config
      - st_data:/data
volumes:
  st_config:
  st_data:

apps.name: FreshRSS
apps.tagline: All your news in one quiet place
apps.description: Self-hosted RSS feed reader and aggregator.
apps.why: Follow news sites, blogs and YouTube channels in one clean timeline — no algorithm, no ads, no doomscrolling. Works with many nice phone apps.
apps.compose:
services:
  freshrss:
    image: freshrss/freshrss:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - fr_data:/var/www/FreshRSS/data
      - fr_ext:/var/www/FreshRSS/extensions
volumes:
  fr_data:
  fr_ext:

apps.name: Stirling PDF
apps.tagline: The Swiss army knife for PDFs
apps.description: Merge, split, compress, sign and convert PDFs in the browser.
apps.why: All those 'edit this PDF' websites — but private, on your own server: merge, split, compress, rotate, sign, convert to Word and 50 other tools. Nothing gets uploaded anywhere.
apps.compose:
services:
  stirling:
    image: stirlingtools/stirling-pdf:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - sp_data:/usr/share/tessdata
      - sp_configs:/configs
volumes:
  sp_data:
  sp_configs:

apps.name: Homepage
apps.tagline: A start page for your server
apps.description: Customizable dashboard with links and live widgets for all your services.
apps.why: One pretty browser start page with buttons to every app on your server, plus live info (downloads, disk space, weather). Set it as your browser homepage and everything is one click away.
apps.compose:
services:
  homepage:
    image: ghcr.io/gethomepage/homepage:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    environment:
      HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS: "*"
    volumes:
      - hp_config:/app/config
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
volumes:
  hp_config:

apps.name: Memos
apps.tagline: Quick notes, like a private Twitter
apps.description: Lightweight note-taking with markdown, tags and an API.
apps.why: Jot down thoughts, links and snippets in seconds — everything is saved on your server, searchable and taggable. Much lighter than a full wiki.
apps.compose:
services:
  memos:
    image: neosmemo/memos:stable
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5230"
    volumes:
      - memos_data:/var/opt/memos
volumes:
  memos_data:
